# .build/demo/Containerfile (generated -- do not edit)

ARG BASE_IMAGE=quay.io/fedora/fedora:43

FROM ${BASE_IMAGE}

# Bootstrap
RUN { [ -L /usr/local ] && mkdir -p "$(readlink /usr/local)"; mkdir -p /usr/local/bin; } && \
    ARCH=$(uname -m) && \
    case "$ARCH" in x86_64) ARCH=amd64;; aarch64) ARCH=arm64;; esac && \
    curl -fsSL "https://github.com/go-task/task/releases/latest/download/task_linux_${ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar -xzf - -C /usr/local/bin task

# User user (uid=1000) adopted from base image (declared in the embedded distro.base_user) — no useradd needed

WORKDIR /home/user

USER 1000
# Image metadata
LABEL ai.opencharly.version="2026.001.0001"
LABEL ai.opencharly.box="demo"
LABEL ai.opencharly.uid="1000"
LABEL ai.opencharly.gid="1000"
LABEL ai.opencharly.user="user"
LABEL ai.opencharly.home="/home/user"
LABEL ai.opencharly.platform.distro='["fedora:43","fedora"]'
LABEL ai.opencharly.platform.format='["rpm"]'
LABEL ai.opencharly.status="testing"
LABEL ai.opencharly.check_level=""
